creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, 	Igor!

Thanks for contacting us!

Can you give more info on the problem you encountered?
What build options you have used?
It looks very strange that there's no "bin2cpp" too in your
object dir.
Having a full build log will be helpful too.

Best regards,
-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
